data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Coexistence proven live 2026-07-02: change 162 fired BOTH LLM-Review (review-bot) and g2p->Verified+1 (Actions run 28612639871) on one patchset-created event. g2p deployed in-container, git-pinned for Gerrit 3.14 compat. Recorded in infra/runbooks/two-vote-gate-rollback.md C.1. Runtime deploy proof is operator-verified, not repo-auto-signable.". Session: 8048b72a1.
